data.title: EZE Cloud Consulting Advances AI-first Strategy with Agile In-house Deployment of Workday GO
data.description: EZE Cloud Consulting is making strides in its AI-first approach by efficiently implementing Workday GO in-house at locations in Singapore, Bengaluru, and San Francisco. This strategic move marks a significant development in their business, showcasing their commitment to leveraging cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Figure Technology Solutions Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: New York, 21st April 2026 - Figure Technology Solutions, listed as Nasdaq: FIGR and OPEN: FGRS, a prominent blockchain-focused capital marketplace facilitating origination, funding, sale, and trading of tokenized assets, has revealed intentions to disclose its performance for the First Quarter of 2026 on Monday, 11th May 2026, post market closure. A conference call to deliberate on the results, future prospects, and associated topics is scheduled for the ensuing morning, Tuesday, 12th May 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump; Trump Announces New Iran Talks With Hormuz Shut
data.description: Following Iran's strict control over the Strait of Hormuz, futures dropped as oil prices surged. President Trump revealed plans for new discussions on Monday, while Tesla's upcoming earnings are highly anticipated. The Dow Jones experienced a decline in futures, with oil prices sharply rising due to the ongoing situation in the Strait of Hormuz. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: AI Demand Sparks Q1 Double-Digit Growth in Asia Pacific’s Technology Services Market, ISG Index™ Finds
data.description: In the first quarter, technology services spending in Asia Pacific grew by double digits, driven by a strong demand for cloud infrastructure services fueled by artificial intelligence. According to the ISG Index, the region saw significant growth with a substantial increase in investments. The surge in spending highlights the increasing importance of technology services in the region, particularly in the cloud sector.

data.title: WD to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: A technology company, Western Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: WDC), based in San Jose, California, shared that they will be participating in various upcoming investor conferences. These include the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference 2026 on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 6:15 a.m. PT / 9:15 a.m. ET, the J.P. Morgan 2026 Global Technology, Media, and Communications Conference on Monday, May 18, 2026, at 1:10 p.m. PT / 4:10 p.m. ET, and the Bank of America Global Technology Conference 2026 on Tuesday, June [date not specified].

data.title: Ascentage Pharma to Present Data from Multiple Trials, Including Three Rapid Oral Presentations, at ASCO 2026
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Ascentage Pharma Group International made an announcement that six abstracts from clinical studies regarding three key drug candidates have been chosen for presentation at the upcoming 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting. This event will take place both in person at McCormick Place in Chicago, IL and online from May 29 to June 2, 2026. The abstracts include data on Olverembatinib (HQP1351), Lisaftoclax (APG-2575), and Alrizomadlin (APG-115). Among these, three abstracts have been chosen for rapid oral presentations and three for poster displays, showcasing the global innovation and clinical significance of Ascentage Pharma’s portfolio. Olverembatinib is noted as the first third-generation BCR-ABL inhibitor approved in China, Lisaftoclax as the first Bcl-2 selective inhibitor developed in China, and Alrizomadlin as an MDM2-p53 inhibitor.

data.title: Innovent to Present New Clinical Data of IBI363（PD-1/IL-2α-biased bispecific fusion protein） at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Innovent Biologics, Inc. announced a partnership between SAN FRANCISCO and SUZHOU, China. Innovent, listed as HKEX: 01801, is a renowned biopharmaceutical company specializing in the development, production, and distribution of top-tier medicines for oncology, cardiovascular, and metabolic treatments.
